title: AI Calendar Productivity App
description: A concept project for an AI-powered calendar and productivity assistant that helps users prioritize tasks, organize schedules, and manage deadlines more effectively.

title: Momentum Research Project
description: A group research project exploring momentum-based ideas, with a focus on identifying patterns and analyzing how they might be applied in a financial setting.

title: Kaggle Commodities Forecasting
description: A forecasting project based on commodity market data, built around time series prediction and feature-based modeling.

title: Finance News RAG
description: A retrieval-augmented generation project designed to summarize finance news and major market events from multiple sources.

title: Alzheimer’s Prediction Model
description: A machine learning project focused on predicting Alzheimer’s-related outcomes using cleaned and merged datasets.

title: Sentiment Analysis on Political Tweets
description: A project analyzing sentiment patterns in political tweets using natural language processing techniques.

title: Black-Scholes Error Margin Research Project
description: A research-oriented project investigating where Black-Scholes pricing errors widen and how mispricing patterns might be studied quantitatively.

title: League of Legends Win Classification Prediction
description: A classification project using League of Legends match data to predict game outcomes based on gameplay and performance features.

title: LPL Hackathon Compliance Project
description: A hackathon project focused on checking employee-related financial news and policy compliance using automated workflows.

title: AI Math Olympiad Solver
description: A project exploring how AI systems might approach and solve Olympiad-style mathematics problems.
